response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way, sir, and I will follow. The silver lining of this situation is that the stranger has shown kindness by offering to help. Wrap your cloak properly, and I will ensure you are safe. This is a difficult moment, but it is not the end of the story."
